vibe: Beautiful, sexy, modern, clean, premium adult, vibrant

headings.usage: Large clean typography for high legibility from 10 feet away. Avoid ultra-thin or black weights.

body.usage: Highly legible geometric sans for metadata, tags, and descriptions.

tv_focus_system.philosophy: D-pad navigation requires highly prominent focus states. The currently focused item must be instantly recognizable from 10 feet away.

rest_state.classes: transform scale-100 transition-all duration-300 ease-out opacity-80

focus_state.classes: transform scale-105 md:scale-110 opacity-100 z-50 ring-4 ring-[#FF2A6D] ring-offset-4 ring-offset-[#050505] shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,42,109,0.5)] bg-[#141414]

hero_carousel.layout: 70vh height, full bleed. Left-aligned content block with 50% width on desktop. Strong gradient overlay.
hero_carousel.bottom_gradient: bg-gradient-to-t from-[#050505] h-32 absolute bottom-0 w-full
hero_carousel.focus: The active hero item gets a primary accent glow on its associated CTA button.

horizontal_rails.title: text-2xl font-semibold mb-6 uppercase tracking-widest text-[#FFFFFF]
horizontal_rails.container: flex overflow-x-auto pb-8 hide-scrollbar scroll-smooth gap-4 md:gap-6
horizontal_rails.card_scene: aspect-video w-64 md:w-80 rounded-xl relative overflow-hidden group bg-[#141414]
horizontal_rails.card_poster: aspect-[2/3] w-48 md:w-60 rounded-xl relative overflow-hidden group bg-[#141414]
horizontal_rails.card_performer: aspect-square w-32 md:w-48 rounded-full relative overflow-hidden group bg-[#141414]
horizontal_rails.card_studio: aspect-[3/1] w-56 md:w-72 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center bg-[#141414] border border-white/10

detail_screen.backdrop: Full bleed with 50% opacity and heavy bottom/left gradient mask.
detail_screen.layout: Grid layout. Left: Metadata, Actions. Right/Bottom: Related rails.
detail_screen.metadata: Title (H1), Year/Duration/Rating (inline list, small), Tags (glassmorphism chips), Synopsis (body large).
detail_screen.auto_focus: The 'Play' button must receive auto-focus when the screen mounts.

buttons.play: bg-[#FF2A6D] text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-bold uppercase tracking-wider focus:outline-none focus:ring-4 focus:ring-white focus:scale-110 focus:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,42,109,0.8)]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/10 text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-bold focus:outline-none focus:bg-white/20 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-[#FF2A6D] focus:scale-110

age_gate.overlay: backdrop-blur-3xl bg-[#050505]/90 fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex items-center justify-center
age_gate.dialog: max-w-xl w-full bg-[#141414]/90 border border-white/10 rounded-3xl p-12 text-center shadow-2xl
age_gate.actions: Flex column or row gap-4. Primary 'I am 18+' button must be distinct, huge, and auto-focused.
age_gate.buttons: Focus states must use the standard TV focus system (scale + ring + glow).

dmca_form.layout: Clean, structured form using Shadcn inputs with dark theme overrides.
dmca_form.focus: Inputs must have strong focus-visible rings (ring-[#FF2A6D]) for D-pad users.

hero_background.description: Silhouette of man and woman in studio with neon pink lighting. Use as the main hero carousel background.

performer_avatar.description: Stylish female model in neon lights. Use for performer circular cards.

abstract_cover.description: Abstract illuminated shapes. Use as fallback for scene posters/thumbnails.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: All text must pass WCAG AA against the dark backgrounds. Avoid gray-on-gray.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: Every focusable card, button, and input MUST have a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='rail-card-1', data-testid='play-button').
accessibility_and_testing.motion: Use prefers-reduced-motion queries to disable scaling if necessary, but keep the ring and color changes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure Shadcn components (if used) are heavily customized to match the Dark/Jewel archetype. Strip away standard Vercel borders.
Implement the TV focus system explicitly using Tailwind's focus-visible or custom state classes tailored for D-pad navigation.
The Home screen needs a full-bleed Hero section that fades gracefully into the horizontal rails below.
Horizontal rails must allow smooth scrolling. Hide standard scrollbars. Provide sufficient right-padding so the last item isn't cut off abruptly.
Detail screen must overlay the backdrop image properly using bg-black/60 masks.
Do NOT use 'Inter'. Apply 'Outfit' for headings and 'Manrope' for body text.
